title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
